title: cunuria spruceana var. bracteosa
intro: Cunuria spruceana var. bracteosa, also known as Bracteosa, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cunuria spruceana var. bracteosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Cunuria spruceana var. bracteosa is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
